query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.phone, t.email, t.createdAt
FROM teachers t
WHERE 
  (t.name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR t.phone LIKE '%test%'
  OR t.email LIKE '%test%'
  OR t.name LIKE '%测试%'
  OR t.phone LIKE '%000%')
  AND t.phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')
  AND (t.email IS NULL OR t.email != '526test@example.com')
ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC;
